data.title: CleanSpark buys Texas land to build AI and HPC data centers as BTC mining shifts
data.description:
CleanSpark is acquiring 447 acres in Texas to construct AI and HPC data centers, rather than focusing solely on Bitcoin mining.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/cleanspark-buys-texas-land/

data.title: Pundit Reveals The Biggest Enemy Of XRP Investors As Price Struggles At $2
data.description:
Many XRP investors continue to adopt a wait-and-see approach, as the price has struggled to break above its current consolidation zone near the $2 level. Although XRP experienced a brief rally from around $1. 90 to over $2 in January 2026, the upward momentum appears to have stalled at that point. A crypto analyst has shared insights into why XRP may be failing to sustain a breakout, noting that the biggest enemy of XRP investors is not price action
source: https://www.newsbtc.com/analysis/xrp/pundit-reveals-the-biggest-enemy-of-xrp-investors-as-price-struggles-at-2/

data.title: An institutional address deposited 3,956 ETH into Binance and Coinbase within 7 hours, while Arrington Capital withdrew 5,500 ETH.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, seven hours ago, Arrington Capital (0x40d...E15E) withdrew 5,500 ETH from Coinbase, worth $18.51 million. Additionally, Amber (0xc47...BB68) and a wallet suspected to be associated with Ethena (0xb5E...C24e) deposited 3,956 ETH, worth $13.24 million, into Coinbase and Binance.

data.title: Russia to open up crypto, aims to make it ‘common occurrence’: Report
data.description:

data.title: Alchemy Pay Secures Money Transmission License in South Dakota
data.description: According to PANews, Alchemy Pay, a payment gateway for fiat and cryptocurrency transactions, has received a Money Transmission License (MTL) from the state of South Dakota. This marks the thirteenth state in the United States where Alchemy Pay has obtained such a license.

data.title: Sonic Recovers Over 5.8 Million S Tokens After Balancer Hack
data.description:
According to Foresight News, Sonic announced via a tweet that its team has successfully recovered 5,829,196 S tokens, which have been proportionally distributed to all affected users.

Previously, Foresight News reported that Sonic had tweeted about the Balancer hack incident involving the Sonic ecosystem project Beets. The two wallets associated with the hacker have been frozen, pending further investigation.

data.title: Arthur Hayes: Dollar liquidity expansion will drive Bitcoin's rise in 2026
data.description: Cointelegraph reported on its X platform that Arthur Hayes predicts in his latest article that as the Federal Reserve's balance sheet expands, bank lending increases, and mortgage rates fall in 2026, dollar liquidity will further increase, and Bitcoin will rise accordingly.

data.title: Sonic Labs: The recovered 5.829 million S tokens have been fully distributed to the attacked users.
data.description: Sonic announced on the X platform that Beets suffered a vulnerability attack in early November 2025. The Sonic Labs team successfully recovered 5,829,196 S tokens, and the funds have been distributed proportionally to all affected users.

data.title: BNB Drops Below 930 USDT with a 1.97% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Jan 15, 2026, 03:39 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, BNB has dropped below 930 USDT and is now trading at 929.780029 USDT, with a narrowed 1.97% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Bitwise LINK spot ETF listed, with a total net inflow of $2.59 million into the US LINK spot ETF in a single day.
data.description: On January 14th, Eastern Time, the Bitwise Chainlink ETF (ticker symbol CLNK) officially listed on the NYSE, bringing the total number of listed LINK spot ETFs to two. According to SoSoValue data, CLNK saw a net inflow of $2.59 million on its first day of trading, with a trading volume of $3.24 million and a total net asset value of $5.18 million. The Grayscale Chainlink Trust ETF saw no net inflows yesterday, with a current historical total net inflow of $63.78 million. The Bitwise Chainlink ETF supports cash/physical redemption, has a management fee of 0.34%, and does not currently support staking. As of press time, the total net asset value of the LINK spot ETF is $95.87 million, the LINK net asset ratio is 0.95%, and the historical cumulative net inflow has reached $66.38 million.

data.title: One trader predicted Bitcoin's price movement 24 times in a single day, earning a total profit of $136,800.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, trader hai15617 used the same strategy to predict Bitcoin price movements again, earning $44,500. Using this strategy, he made 24 predictions in a single day, with 8 correct predictions, a win rate of 33.33%, and a total profit of $136,800.

data.title: Solana's RWA Ecosystem Reaches Record High Value
data.description: According to Odaily, SolanaFloor announced on the X platform that the total value of Solana's Real World Asset (RWA) ecosystem has surpassed $1 billion, marking a new historical peak.
